TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Tjadukudukung, title = Tjadukudukung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjadukudukung} }

S.FORM: = Tjadukudukung = Gaga mniq Pingtung Mancowsyang ka alang Tjadukudukung. 235 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 663 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 62% niqan 413 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 38% niqan 250 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan59%, Amis2%, Rukai1%, ni rahuq na o1%.
S.PHON: = tɟadukudukuŋ = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ manʦowsjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟadukudukuŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, amis*%, ɾukai*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Tjadukudukung = Gaga mniq Pingtung Mancowsyang ka alang Tjadukudukung. 235 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 663 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 62% niqan 413 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 38% niqan 250 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan59%, Amis2%, Rukai1%, ni rahuq na o1%.
S.PHON: = tɟadukudukuŋ = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ manʦowsjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟadukudukuŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, amis*%, ɾukai*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
